feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error Creating Content Provider for SAP Build Work Zone in Consumer Subaccount
entry.content:
I am trying to create a multi-tenant application with SAPUI5 interface that is consumed by the subscriber's SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition subscription, but I am getting errors trying to create the Content Provider. 

Following the tutorial in the documentation Developing HTML5 Business Solutions as Content Providers, which has steps for Multitenant consumption via subscription. I updated the "sap.cloud.service" in the SAPUI5 manifest.json file, added the cdm.json file and the script on the mta.yaml file to copy it to the resources folder. I also defined the destination templates in the provider side.

After that I followed the Administrator steps in Federation of HTML5 Business Solutions documentation. Subscribed to the multi-tenant app from another subaccount in the same environment and region. Exported and imported the destinations to the consumer subaccount, changing the runtime destination URL to the subscription URL of the consumer.

However after I create the Content Provider in the consumer SAP Build Work Zone channel manager, the content fetch fails with the following message:

"<Connectivity/InternalError>: Could not fetch content due to an internal error. Please try again later. If the issue persists, please open a ticket on the connectivity service."

This is the code I am currently working in https://github.tools.sap/I538205/simple-saas-mt/tree/bwz 
and I also tested the sample from https://github.com/SAP-samples/build-workzone-integration/tree/main/standard/html5-content-provider-sample which also failed to import the content provider.

Has anyone else here faced this issue? How can I solve it?

entry.title: Error 404 when trying to access a full stack CAP application deployed in Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have created a full stack CAP application and deployed it in Cloud Foundry. However when trying to access the app via HTML5 repository, I get a blank page and when I open the console, I see a bunch of 404 errors.

 

I have followed a youtube tutorial: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z10xke7yli4&list=PL54JdsBCvI0mPwzMkzlNnulw3NaxoWzks&index=23
The steps which I followed were exactly the same, still I am getting this issue.

Steps to reproduce:

1. Clone the github repository: https://github.com/developedbysom/cap-animal-adopt.git

2. Run npm install.

3. Run cds add hana --for production

4. Run cds add xsuaa --for production

5. Run cds add workzone (Since we are using managed approuter, this will also create xs-app.json in app/adopter)
6. Run npm install --prefix app/adopter/

7. Run cds add mta 
8. Run mbt build -t gen --mtar mta.tar && cf deploy gen/mta.tar

I have added my xs-app.json,mta.yaml and manifest.json files as txt in the question.
Please look into this and guide me if I am doing anything wrong.

Thanks,

Regards,

Raihan

entry.title: Performing actions from Work Zone notifications and handling it in CAP application
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have followed the Developing Cloud Foundry Applications With Notifications tutorial and successfully created an application with notifications working as expected.

Now, I am trying to enhance it by adding actions to the notifications. I am currently facing an issue in the following scenario:

Use Case: Leave Request Action

  • I have a Leave Request entity.
  • When a leave request is created, a notification is sent to the approver.
  • The notification includes an action button – for example: "Reject Leave".
  • When the user clicks the Reject action, the backend CAP Java application receives a call to the /ExecuteAction API.

 

Problem:

In the /ExecuteAction call, I want to receive the Leave Request ID (or some unique record identifier) so that I can find and reject the correct record in the backend.

I tried adding a placeholder like {leaveRequestId} in the ActionId or TargetParameters, but this did not work.

What I Need Help With:

  • How can I pass the leave's record ID or other dynamic parameters to the backend via the /ExecuteAction payload?
  • Is there a supported way to include contextual data in the action definition or payload so that the backend knows which record to act on?

entry.title: SAP IAS Federated Access AWS Cognito
entry.content:
Hello SAP-Community,

In a recent project for a client, we had a feature request that consisted of making a Fiori application available in SAP BTP Workzone, so far so good. Currently, this client has a mobile application developed by a third party that uses AWS Cognito as an identity provider (IdP) and our need is to provide access to this Fiori application without a request new login.

My question would be whether it is possible to establish a trust relationship between SAP IAS and AWS Cognito so that a new login operation is not required? If so, is there any documentation or a step-by-step guide to help us?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: In Work Zone how do I exclude a page from search results?
entry.content:
In Work Zone I want to exclude a page from the search results. 

How can I do this?

entry.title: PayPal Payment Button with SAP Build Workzone & S/4HANA Public Cloud via PayPal Braintree
entry.content:
We’ve developed a custom sales platform using SAP Build Workzone, integrated with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and are in the process of implementing PayPal as a payment method.

We are currently using PayPal Braintree as our payment service provider (PSP), and the integration requires the use of the PayPal JavaScript SDK – https://developer.paypal.com/sdk/js/ – to render the PayPal payment button on the front end.

We’re encountering issues embedding/loading this PayPal JavaScript SDK within the Workzone environment. Anyone know of a workaround or how to load a JavaScript library on SAP Build?

The ultimate goal is: the user should be able to see the PayPal payment button on Checkout screen, and on click, it should trigger a new page to sign into their PayPal account and load the checkout details i.e. total price and allow them to choose and submit payment.

entry.title: SAP Work Zone: how long does it take for new content to be indexed by the search tool?
entry.content:
When I've added content to a work page in Work Zone how long does it take for it to be indexed by the search tool?

I've added content that isn't showing up right now.

entry.title: SAP Workzone Content Provider from another subaccount error - Design Time Destination
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are trying to configure a content provider in our SAP WZ subaccount. This content provider is from another BTP subaccount where we have UI5 apps deployed. We are following the blog as follows:

Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subac... - SAP Community

Whilst we are creating the content provider in the SAP WZ subaccount we are getting the error as follows:

<Connectivity/NotFound>: Could not fetch the content from the design-time destination. Please verify that the URL is correct.

The destination looks as follows:

With endpoint URL as follows:

https://html5-apps-repo-rt.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/applications/cdm/log-rf-kanban-replenishment-ui5

Any idea about what the error can be?

Thanks in advance.

C.

entry.title: Work Zone ECSC integration card custom icon
entry.content:
I'm building a Work Zone workspace which includes UI integration cards to ECSC and SuccessFactors - see grab. 

The SF integration cards (right) allow me to select which icon I wish to appear in the header. The ECSC (left) doesn't.

How can I get the icon I want to appear in the ECSC card? Ideally this would be a custom icon as the SF cards now allow.

entry.title: how can we expose Fiori Launchpad shell plugins to SAP Build WorkZone?
entry.content: Is there an easy way to make the FLP Shell plugins available in SAP Build WorkZone?

entry.title: HTTP 431 Error – Work Zone Admin UI Not Accessible Due to Request Header Size
entry.content:
We are experiencing a consistent 431 Request Header Fields Too Large error when accessing the SAP Build Work Zone (standard edition) Admin UI in our development subaccount.

  • The base domain returns 302 Found, redirecting to /sites

  • The 431 only happens when the browser sends a Cookie header (e.g., user session or SSO)

  • The backend CAP service is working and reachable via direct app URLs

  • The HTML5 application is deployed correctly via the Managed AppRouter

  • The issue persists across browsers and profiles, and also occurs in curl requests with cookies

entry.title: SAP Workzone Local Entry Point plan availability
entry.content:
Hi 

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition - Local Entry Point Business Solutions is in General Availabilty as of April 17 2025

I am following the SAP documentation for creating a local entry point in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition. The guide states that I need to create an instance of the build-workzone-standard service with the local-entry-point plan in the SAP BTP cockpit.

However, when I try to create a service instance, I do not see the local-entry-point plan listed under the available plans or entitlements for build-workzone-standard. Australia Sydney AWS.

  • Where can I find the local-entry-point plan?

  • Are there any prerequisites or steps I might have missed to make this plan available?

Cheers

JSP

entry.title: SAP mobile start could not load external app for many supported standard apps
entry.content:
While trying to open the app "Transfer Stock - In-Plant" in SAP Mobile Start Application it is not opening and giving the error "could not load external app". There are other apps that are loading without issues and also this app is opening successfully in the desktop and on the mobile browser. Only in the app it gives this error.

There are other apps with such issues as well such as Stock - Single Material, Post Goods Receipt, Post Goods Receipt for Production Order, and many other. One of the example of the app that is opening correctly is Manage Central Supplier Confirmation.

entry.title: How can I deep link to a Success Factors function that appears in an overlay visually?
entry.content:
Success Factors employee central has a number of features that appear as overlays to the home page, rather than separate pages with unique URLs. An example (on our instance) is the delegate function, a simple workflow that opens as a overlay over the home screen (see attached pic) when the delegate tile is selected. 

I want to deep link to the delegate function from a Work Zone page giving guidance around the delegate function. How can I do this?

entry.title: BSP future in Private Cloud 2023 FPS2
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I'm just after a bit of advice and guidance regarding future state of BSPs in a Private Cloud S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 scenario.

Now the general guidance from SAP is to modernise BSPs and older UIs to Fiori apps or potentially SAP Build Apps, and I fully agree and endorse that, but our organisation has been given specific guidance that BSPs will no longer be supported in S/4HANA.

Now, I know that BSPs deployed in our PoC S/4HANA environment function perfectly fine, and that as part of the ABAP stack they currently should continue to function as intended.  BSPs can also be applied to a tile as a URL link and launched from the Fiori Launchpad.  That launchpad when federated to Work Zone SE also functions as expected.

Problem is I've not been able to locate any depreciation or sunset notification or notes (with the exception of CL_BSP_LOGIN_APPLICATION), that support the statement that BSPs will not be supported in S/4HANA, so I am after some advice from the community in case I've missed something, as I cannot find any withdrawal of support from SAP for this aging UI technology.  

Thanks in advance for any responses.

entry.title: Integrate SAP CRM WEB UI in BTP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I am trying to Integrate the SAP CRM WEB UI (crm_ui_start) in SAP BTP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition.

Created the Run time destination in the BTP cockpit and created a App with following properties:

 

App UI Technology: WebClient UI
WebClient Application ID: /bsp/sap/crm_ui_start/default.htm
 
After assigning the App to site, it is reaching to CRM system but not able to load the WEB UI page where user can select the business role.
 
PFA the error screen shot for reference.
 
Please let me know if any configuration is missing.
 
Thanks in advance.
 
Regards,
Rohit Gera

entry.title: Work zone differences and widgets
entry.content:
Hi, sorry. How can I see the templates for de SAP Bussiness Workzone and the widgets that I can use?

Also, what is the difference between SAP Build Work zone and SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone?

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Actions in SAP Build Process Automation -- Need to call $Batch in Action Task
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to implement a batch call in Build Process Automation using an Action Task. I have configured the destination in the BTP Cockpit and also created an Action Project in SAP Build.

When testing the Action Project independently, I am able to retrieve the expected data. However, when using it within a workflow, I am encountering the following error:

Action Identifier:
post_batch
Destination:
GET_DATA
Error Message:
Action '7a1f2496-6c0d-48ce-a724-9ca2651d8fab' failed with the following error:
'Action metadata not found in database for tenant f5a191b7-809f-4113-87fe-6b21da19d542, project us10.93112af8trial.getdatacall, version 1.0.3, action group b315b59d-bafd-3cbf-a4a2-79a0743dfac0, and action post_batch'.

Log ID:
fdc268b4-2c5c-439a-814b-802b67e-us10

I have also attached a screenshot of the configuration.
Please let me know how I can resolve this issue.

Destination Config Screenshot:

Action Config Screenshot:

 

BPA workflow Screenshot:

Thanks,

Parth

entry.title: Logout functionality SAP CAP application deployed in Cloud Foundry using Managed approuter
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have built a SAP CAP application with UI5 and used managed approuter. The application is deployed in Cloud Foundry and I can access it through HTML5 applications. This application uses XSUAA authentication. 

I want to implement logout functionality in this application for the user. I have read many blogs and I'm unable to implement it. I have done things like making changes in xs-app.json file to include the logout parameter as described in the link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/logout

On the logout button in my app, i put the controller logic to 

window.location.replace("/my/logout").

After this when I click on logout, it takes me to a URL:
"https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/resources/sap-ui-logout-url" and when i click the back button, it again goes directly into the application logged in as the previous user, which means that it is not deleting the session maybe.

I even followed the question:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/logout-sap-ui5-app-cloud-foundry-sample-code/qaq-p/12248689

(Yes, I gave relative path in the controller script like my/logout as I am using managed approuter)

But when i do this, i get an internal server error after clicking on logout.

On checking the error logs of the app, I see the error as:
GET request to /74cf1c07-1827-49d2-9bc9-90ba4d9f6781.capleavemanagementappservice.leavemanagement-1.0.0/my/logout completed with status 500 request method (GET) does not match logout configuration logoutMethod (POST)


Does anybody know how can I implement a logout functionality in my application?

Thanks,
Raihan

entry.title: Unable to view tile on SAP Work Zone
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Good afternoon. I hope you are all doing well.

We have successfully created a tile with a custom Semantic Object, which navigates to a custom transaction and functions correctly on the S/4HANA Fiori Launchpad. However, despite properly exposing the content from the S/4HANA system, the same functionality does not appear to be synced with Workzone.

I would greatly appreciate your guidance in resolving this issue. Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards, Ramesh Reddy
